item.name: Get User Device Tokens by Platform
Get All Active Tenants with Config

request.description: Gateway path: /api/v1/ai/chat/stream. YARP transforms to /api/v1/chat/stream on port 5008. Returns text/event-stream SSE.

item.name: Audit Logs
item.description: Per-service audit log endpoints routed through the gateway. All require Admin or SuperAdmin role. x-tenant-id header is optional (OptionalTenantAttribute).

request.description: Gateway path: GET /api/admin/audit-logs → Identity service (port 5001). Returns PaginatedList<AuditLogDto>.
Gateway path: GET /api/admin/tenant/audit-logs → Tenant service (port 5002). Returns PaginatedList<AuditLogDto>.
Gateway path: GET /api/admin/notifications/audit-logs → Notification service (port 5004). Returns PaginatedList<AuditLogDto>.
Gateway path: GET /api/admin/filemanager/audit-logs → FileManager service (port 5005). Returns PaginatedList<AuditLogDto>.
Gateway path: GET /api/admin/translations/audit-logs → Translation service (port 5006). Returns PaginatedList<AuditLogDto>.
Gateway path: GET /api/admin/categories/audit-logs → Category service (port 5007). Returns PaginatedList<AuditLogDto>.
Gateway path: GET /api/admin/nasheed/audit-logs → Nasheed service (port 5009). Returns PaginatedList<AuditLogDto>.
